name: Tanaka
description: The steward of the Phantomhive household. No one actually knows what Tanaka does around the house, save for sit around and drink tea. His reaction to any situation, no matter how strange, is to merely smile, take a sip of his tea, and chuckle. In other words, he's a bit of an enigma. Most of the time he is in what is known as a chibi form. It is said he can only revert back to Normal Tanaka for a few minutes before reverting back to his small form. ~! name: Yona Whitefall
description: Yona is a maid motivated by money. She is from a fallen noble house.

name: Akihiko Usami
description: A 28-year-old author. He was raised in England until he was 10, and later moved to Japan. He graduated law school first of his class and is the youngest recipient of the Naomori Award. He was a pure-hearted romanticist, as Takahashi Misaki, his love interest says. He is extremely popular with his books, but also writes erotic (BL) Yaoi fiction under the pen name Akikawa Yayoi because it allows him to earn money on his fantasies. name: Bridget
description: __Height:__ 158 cm __Birthplace:__ England She was born in a village where the birth of twins of the same gender was considered bad luck, and hence her family named and raised her as a girl. When she became older, she decided that she would prove her worth and pride by becoming a bounty hunter. She is given a fake list of bounties by I-No, sending her against many of the other fighters. She fights with a yo-yo and Roger, her mechanical, over sized teddy bear.

name: Eun-Hyuk Lee
description: Eighteen year old Hyuk Lee is the leader of the Green Roof Apartments Survivors and Eun Lee's older brother. He is also one of the deuteragonists of the series with the others being some of the Green Roof Apartment survivors. Hyuk is an intelligent and level-headed young man with an affinity for leadership. name: Kentarou Yamada

name: Nagi Rokuya
description: __Height:__ 180 cm Nagi Rokuya remarkably good looks and high charisma combine to turn him into a bit of a flirting machine, he's often see flirting with women. His charisma is a double-edged sword, however, as his personality and looks combined made it so he didn’t have many friends growing up. As a result, he loves IDOLiSH7 more than anyone else. In times of strife, it’s usually Nagi’s very obvious love for his friends that manages to bring smiles back to their faces.

name: Sister  Ivry
description: Sister Ivry is a machine part of the Four Shining Stars. Her power, Heal Atomizer, is a Healing Ether ability that allows her to mend wounds, undo negative status effects, and repair living machines. Sister is short tempered, enjoys teasing, and has a laid-back attitude, but she is also dutiful and can be friendly to her allies. She has a sadistic side and enjoys torture. name: Takuru Miyashiro
description: A diligent third-year high school student and President of the Newspaper Club. His parents died during the earthquake six years ago. Since then, he has taken shelter in the mobile home near Miyashita Public Park.

name: Yoshikage Kira
description: Yoshikage Kira is a marine surgeon. He mostly acts cold and apathetic towards others, although he is not as heartless as he seems. ~!Yoshikage is Holy Joestar-Kira's son and Kei Nijimura's older brother. He underwent an equivalent exchange with Josefumi Kujo, fusing together to become Josuke Higashikata. He is also a stand user who wields Killer Queen.!~
